summary: Frontend testing of Staff Configuration and Staff Planning modules completed. All 7 requested features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Staff Configuration - Services & Postes: '+ Ajouter' button opens modal with fields (Nom, Description, Type, Couleur, Postes)
Staff Configuration - Contrats (Modeles): '+ Nouveau modele' button opens creation modal with all fields (Nom, Type de contrat, Description, Variables dynamiques, Contenu, Statut)
Staff Configuration - Contrats (Modeles): Edit (pencil) icon opens edit modal with pre-filled data and 'Mettre à jour' button
Staff Planning - 'Extra' button opens modal with fields (Prénom, Nom, Email, Téléphone, Poste, Taux horaire, Date, Type d'horaire, Heure début, Heure fin)
Staff Planning - 'Edition masse' button opens modal with Collaborateur dropdown, Type d'horaire grid (M/S/N/OFF/Repos/CP/MAL/F), and multi-date Calendar component
Staff Planning - 'Exporter' button generates CSV file (planning_2026-03.csv) and shows 'Planning exporté' toast
Staff Planning - 'Imprimer' button opens new window with styled print content
critical_code_review_comments: StaffConfiguration.jsx: Well-structured with Dialog components from Shadcn/UI for modals
StaffConfiguration.jsx: Services & Postes modal includes dynamic position management with add/remove functionality
StaffConfiguration.jsx: Contract template modal includes variable insertion feature for dynamic contract content
StaffPlanning.jsx: Extra modal properly creates temporary employee with 'extra' contract type and assigns shift
StaffPlanning.jsx: Bulk edit modal uses Calendar component with mode='multiple' for multi-date selection
StaffPlanning.jsx: Export generates proper CSV with semicolon delimiter and includes employee/department/shift data
StaffPlanning.jsx: Print function creates styled HTML document with proper CSS for print media
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Configuration and Planning modules fully tested. All modals working correctly with proper fields. Services & Postes modal has Nom/Description/Type/Couleur/Postes fields. Contract modal has full editor with variable insertion. Extra modal creates temporary employee with shift. Bulk edit uses multi-date calendar. Export generates CSV, Print opens styled window.

fields: Same as creation modal with pre-filled data

imprimer.output: New window with styled HTML for printing
